data.title: JUST DeFi Protocol Reaches $9.26 Billion TVL on TRON Blockchain
data.description: According to Odaily, the total value locked (TVL) in the JUST DeFi protocol on the TRON blockchain has reached $9.26 billion. This milestone underscores its strategic importance as a core DeFi infrastructure within the TRON ecosystem. As a leading DeFi protocol on TRON, JUST is committed to continuous innovation and upgrades. The protocol aims to enhance cross-chain asset exchanges and smart staking and lending services, striving to provide users with a safer and more efficient one-stop DeFi solution.

data.title: TikTok Denies Allegations of Purchasing TRUMP Coin Amid Political Accusations
data.description: According to Foresight News, TikTok's official policy account on X has refuted claims regarding its ownership acquiring TRUMP coin. The denial comes in response to accusations made by California Democratic Representative Brad Sherman. Sherman had previously alleged that TikTok's Chinese owner announced a $300 million purchase of TRUMP coin.

data.title: Metaplanet's Trading Volume Reaches 6.7 Million Shares
data.description: According to Foresight News, Metaplanet's CEO announced on X that the company achieved a trading volume of 6.7 million shares by the close of trading, with a transaction value of approximately 12 billion yen.

data.title: A player successfully grabbed UPTOP's first TGE by spending only $1.5 in Gas
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the first successful purchase of UPTOP tokens launched on TGE at 17:00 today came from the address 0xE6e...d9697. On-chain data shows that the owner of this address had pre-deployed 4996 ammunition depot addresses holding 20 USD1 23 hours before the start of TGE, and initiated a rush purchase operation when it went online, successfully completing the first purchase with a Gas fee of about US$1.5.

data.title: Bank of England Governor Questions Need for Digital Pound
data.description: According to PANews, Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey recently expressed skepticism about the necessity of a consumer-facing digital pound during a conference in Kyiv, Ukraine. Bailey stated that he remains unconvinced of the need to create a new form of currency, marking the clearest official reservation regarding the "Britcoin" initiative. The project is currently in the design phase but faces public concerns over privacy and security, banking industry worries about deposit outflows, and warnings from the House of Lords Economic Affairs Committee that the risks may outweigh the benefits. Bailey noted that while progress is being made on wholesale central bank digital currencies for interbank settlements, the retail version still requires justification of its practical benefits.

data.title: OKX Wallet launches xBTC related activities, with a total prize pool of 1 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the first phase of xBTC is now online on Solana, and a series of related activities have been launched. From 15:00 (UTC+8) on June 20, users who deposit xBTC, USDT, USDG or SOL can participate in sharing the $1 million reward. In addition, the function of depositing to Kamino and the USDG loan reward will be launched soon.

data.title: JustLendDAO will launch the sixth phase of USDD 2.0 staking mining plan
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the USDD 2.0 staking incentive activity continues, and the sixth phase will be officially launched on the JustLendDAO platform. It is reported that this activity will continue the high return mechanism of 20% annualized rate of return, and users can participate in mining by staking idle USDD to obtain stable income.

data.title: $324,000 in Free Cash To Be Dished Out in Major US City in New Initiative Inspired by Guaranteed Income Programs
data.description:
A new initiative in New York City will hand out $324,000 to freelance dancers struggling to make ends meet. Inspired by guaranteed income programs, the Dance Workforce Resilience (DWR) Fund will provide $1,000 grants with no strings attached to more than 320 dancers.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/20/324000-in-free-cash-to-be-dished-out-in-major-us-city-in-new-initiative-inspired-by-guaranteed-income-programs/

data.title: North Korean Hackers Pose as Coinbase Recruiters to Steal Crypto with ‘PylangGhost’ Trojan
data.description:
North Korean cybercriminals have escalated their targeting of crypto professionals with a sophisticated new Python-based malware called "PylangGhost," deploying elaborate fake job interview schemes that impersonate major companies, to steal credentials from over 80 browser extensions and crypto wallets.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/north-korean-hackers-pose-as-coinbase-recruiters-to-steal-crypto-with-pylangghost-trojan/

data.title: Conan has reached a strategic cooperation with market makers and has destroyed 40% of the chips
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Trump concept meme project Conan has reached a strategic cooperation with three market makers. Conan has destroyed 40% of its chips, with a total value of over 3 million US dollars.
According to market data, Conan has risen by more than 50% in the past 24 hours, and is now reported at 0.0103USDT, with 14181 holders.

data.title: Ethereum Strategy Reserve Surpasses $3 Billion
data.description: According to Foresight News, Cointelegraph reports that the Ethereum (ETH) strategy reserve, driven by 38 entities, has exceeded $3 billion. This milestone highlights the growing interest and investment in Ethereum's strategic reserves, reflecting the cryptocurrency's expanding influence in the financial sector.

data.title: QCP: BTC and ETH implied volatility structures release downward expectations, and the market is waiting for key catalysts
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News QCP Capital released a market commentary on June 20, pointing out that despite the risk of escalation in the Middle East situation, BTC prices continue to consolidate, investor sentiment remains on the sidelines, and the market is waiting for a clear catalyst to emerge.
The derivatives market shows a more cautious tone: the risk reversal structure of BTC and ETH still shows a preference for downside protection, indicating that longs are hedging spot positions; in addition, ETH's June at-the-money implied volatility is lower than that of the September contract, which may reflect the decline in short-term event-driven volatility or profit-taking by some investors.
QCP believes that despite the low volatility, the market is in a state of "ready to go", and any macro events, policy changes or sudden news may ignite violent fluctuations again.

data.title: Russia's Digital Ruble Set for 2026 Launch Amid Infrastructure Delays
data.description:
According to PANews, Anatoly Aksakov, Chairman of the Financial Markets Committee of the Russian State Duma, announced on June 18 that the widespread implementation of the digital ruble is now scheduled for 2026. The initial plan was to launch after July 1, 2025, but it has been postponed to allow financial institutions more time to enhance their infrastructure.

Since its pilot phase began in August 2023, the digital ruble initiative has expanded to include 15 banks, approximately 2,000 individuals, and 50 businesses. To date, the system has processed over 55,000 personal transfers and 15,000 payments for goods.

The Central Bank of Russia has emphasized that the adoption of the digital ruble will be entirely voluntary, and there are no plans to eliminate cash or non-cash payment methods.

data.title: Hong Kong Virtual Asset ETFs Record Trading Volume
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the trading volume for all Hong Kong virtual asset ETFs reached approximately HKD 6.5942 million by the close of trading today. The Huaxia Bitcoin ETF (3042.HK/9042.HK/83042.HK) recorded a trading volume of HKD 1.9149 million, while the Huaxia Ethereum ETF (03046.HK/09046.HK/83046.HK) saw a volume of HKD 1.5178 million.

The Harvest Bitcoin ETF (03439.HK/09439.HK) had a trading volume of HKD 949,200, and the Harvest Ethereum ETF (03179.HK/09179.HK) recorded HKD 694,000.

Additionally, the Bosera Bitcoin ETF (03008.HK/09008.HK) reported a trading volume of HKD 528,800, while the Bosera Ethereum ETF (03009.HK/09009.HK) had a volume of HKD 989,500.

data.title: Market Awaits Catalyst Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description: According to Odaily, QCP Capital's market commentary on June 20 highlights that despite the potential for escalating tensions in the Middle East, Bitcoin's price remains stable, with investors adopting a wait-and-see approach as they anticipate a clear catalyst. The derivatives market reflects a cautious tone, with the risk reversal structure for Bitcoin and Ethereum indicating a preference for downside protection, suggesting that bulls are hedging their spot positions. Additionally, Ethereum's implied volatility for June is lower than that of September contracts, possibly indicating a decline in short-term event-driven volatility or profit-taking by some investors. QCP Capital believes that although volatility is currently low, the market is in a 'ready-to-explode' state, where any macroeconomic event, policy change, or unexpected news could trigger significant fluctuations.
